creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
The folks in charge of IPv6 conformance testing based their solution off what I did some time ago in making TAHI work on OneFS.

I could set it up again, but it's going to take time (weeks), mostly because TAHI is so fidgety with the results and this is a lower priority item for me.

I'll prod the the other folks internally, but I can't make any guarantees as far as timeframes are concerned.
